THET680 History of Fashion for Theatre (3 Credits)

Evolution of clothing styles and materials through history, from early Mid- Eastern civilizations to the present day.

Credit Only Granted for. THET680 or THET669A.

Formerly: THET669A.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]

882 TLPL - Teaching and Learning, Policy and Leadership

THET685 History of Theatrical Theory Before Modernism (3 Credits) Theories of drama (written script) and theatre (performance) from fifth- century B.C. Greece through nineteenth-century romanticism. Recommended: THET600.
